free_text: Excitation functions for the reactions Mg-24(d,a)Na-22,
English translation
Mg, Fe, Zn stacks were used.
Error of the absolute cross section
determination consisted of the errors of deuteron
beam current measurements, facility geometry
determination and measuring apparatus uncertainty.
Energy error was due to uncertainty of
initial deuteron beam energy. Error value varied:
(+ -0.3) MeV for E=8 MeV; (+ -0.5) MeV for E=4 MeV.
In Sub 002-009 RAD-DET was added. In
Sub 007-009 DECAY-DATA were changed.

First run of measurements.
Irradiation time was 30 minutes.
Steel foil with the thickness of 15 mu-m and 30 mu-m
was used.
For each foil decay curves were analyzed with
periods: 18.2 hours, 6.0 days and 80 days. The 18.2
activity was separated from 16.0 days and 80 days
activities.
